summary: The diff only modifies project_state.json to record the requirement as a pending task (AR-4). No actual implementation changes were made to InteractiveGlobe.tsx or any frontend file. REQ-1 is entirely unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: In InteractiveGlobe.tsx, locate the time button that currently lives in the fixed right bottom panel and render a duplicate of it in the left-side controls panel, positioned directly below the Day/Night Terminator and Twilight Zone toggle controls. The duplicated button must be fully functional (same onClick handler, same state bindings) and visually consistent with the existing controls in that area.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes were made to InteractiveGlobe.tsx or any other frontend file. The diff only updates project_state.json to mark this as a pending task, meaning the actual UI duplication has not been implemented.
